backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing access-controlled user link management plus initial types for API keys, providers, and profiles.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing implemented features, related files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: List of short summaries for numerous frontend files describing their roles in routing, UI, providers, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining color variables, themes, and global styles for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point setting up the PWA manifest, icons, root div, and service worker registration.
frontend/public/export/README.md: README providing installation, prerequisites, and local development instructions for the generated ZIP export.
frontend/public/manifest.webmanifest: PWA manifest defining app metadata, icons, colors, and display settings.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing precaching, runtime caching, and navigation fallback for the PWA.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app routing configuration using TanStack Router with provider pages, auth gating, and dynamic provider routes.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Handles authentication flow with Internet Identity, showing loading, login UI, or children based on auth state.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Provides a login/logout button that manages Internet Identity auth and clears cached queries.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter a name, storing it locally until backend support exists.
frontend/src/components/chat/ChatbotComm: Chat interface for provider bots with message history, input handling, backend readiness checks, and auto-scrolling.
frontend/src/components/chat/ChatMessage: Parses chat text for URLs, rendering normal links or ZIP download buttons.
frontend/src/components/common/BackendCo: Displays backend connection errors with suggested actions and retry or login buttons.
frontend/src/components/common/ErrorBoun: Catches component errors and shows a fallback UI with reset capability.
frontend/src/components/common/NotIntegr: Shows a notice that a given feature is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/components/keys/ProviderKey: Manages provider API keys with backend connection handling, saving, editing, and error states.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppFooter: Renders the application footer with licensing text and a link to terms.
App layout including navigation, routed content, footer, and profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/layout/MobilePro: Mobile slide-in navigation listing AI providers with active state detection and close-on-select behavior.
frontend/src/components/layout/MobileTop: Right-side mobile menu offering top-level navigation links with icons using a sheet-based UI.
frontend/src/components/layout/TopNav.ts: Top navigation bar with logo, desktop links, mobile menu toggles, and PWA/login controls.
frontend/src/components/links/LinkCard.t: Card UI for displaying a saved link with actions to copy, share, edit, or delete it.
frontend/src/components/links/LinkCreate: Form to create a new link with validation for description and URL, calling the add-link mutation.
frontend/src/components/links/LinkEditDi: Dialog for editing an existing link with validation and update mutation handling.
frontend/src/components/providers/Provid: Wrapper that checks backend status and API key availability before rendering provider actions.
Desktop sidebar listing AI providers with active highlighting and scrollable navigation.
Renders dynamic provider workflow option fields and executes workflows, displaying latest run and history. Handles form state, workflow execution, and optional image generation.
frontend/src/components/providers/Recomm: Shows a list of suggested prompts that users can click to auto-fill a command input. Renders within a card layout.
frontend/src/components/pwa/PwaInstallPr: Displays install UI for the PWA depending on browser support and platform, including iOS-specific instructions. Hides itself when the app is already installed.
frontend/src/components/workflows/Execut: Displays workflow run status, inputs, metadata, and optional reuse action. Shows success, failure, running, or pending state with alerts.
frontend/src/components/workflows/Genera: Shows a grid of past generation runs with status, thumbnails, and actions like download, share, and reuse. Handles thumbnail load failures and statuses for image/video outputs.
Displays a single generation run with status badge, preview, and actions such as cancel, download, and share. Handles image load errors and updates run status if needed.
Manages provider-specific chat messages with querying and sending via backend actor. Handles loading states, errors, and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/keys/useProviderKey.t: Fetches whether a provider key exists and provides a mutation to save or update API keys. Integrates backend actor state with React Query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/links/useLinks.ts: Hooks for fetching and mutating links via backend actor, with query invalidation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/providers/useCustomPr: Fetches and saves custom provider metadata with React Query, invalidating related caches on update.
frontend/src/hooks/providers/useResolved: Resolves a provider’s display name, preferring custom metadata when available.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, refetching dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendActor.ts: Initializes a backend actor based on identity, reporting readiness and supporting retries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth state, login/logout handling, and persistent identity management.
frontend/src/hooks/usePwaInstallPrompt.t: Detects PWA installability, tracks installation state, and exposes a method to trigger the install prompt.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Retrieves the caller’s user profile and admin status using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/workflows/useCancelWo: Cancels a workflow run and invalidates workflow run queries for the associated provider.
frontend/src/hooks/workflows/useClearPen: Clears pending workflow runs for a provider and refreshes workflow run queries.
frontend/src/hooks/workflows/useImageGen: Manages image generation workflow runs, updating run status and generating images through a backend key and service.
frontend/src/hooks/workflows/useWorkflow: Executes workflows and updates workflow runs via backend actor, with cache invalidation on success.
React Query hook fetching workflow runs for a provider with conditional polling for active runs.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles and CSS variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point setting up React Query, Internet Identity, and rendering the root component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanelPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that checks admin status and displays placeholder cards for future admin tools.
frontend/src/pages/KeyVaultPage.tsx: Key management page listing all providers with status indicators and links to manage keys.
frontend/src/pages/LinksDashboardPage.ts: Dashboard for creating, listing, and managing saved links with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryBrainPage.tsx: Page describing the planned RAG-based memory system with a placeholder callout.
frontend/src/pages/ProviderHubPage.tsx: Provider selection hub displaying provider cards with capabilities and links to command centers.
frontend/src/pages/providers/CustomSlotP: Provides a settings page for custom providers, allowing editing display names, managing keys, and configuring tool options.
frontend/src/pages/providers/GenericProv: Displays a generic provider interface with chat, prompts, key management, and tool configuration tabs.
frontend/src/pages/providers/LTXPage.tsx: Shows the LTX provider page with key management, recommended prompts, and tool configuration options.
Implements the OpenAI provider page with chat, image generation, and analysis tabs plus key management.
frontend/src/pages/providers/ReplicatePa: Provides the Replicate provider interface including key management, prompts, and tool option fields.
Displays the RunPod provider page with recommended prompts, key management, and workflow tool settings.
frontend/src/pages/providers/SlackPage.t: Implements the Slack provider configuration page with key management, prompts, and tool workflow options.
frontend/src/pages/StudioToolsPage.tsx: Page listing planned studio tools such as Motion Brush, Magic Script, and Generation History using placeholder callouts.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Renders the Terms & Conditions page with sections detailing usage, licensing, privacy, and disclaimers.
frontend/src/providers/providers.ts: Defines provider types and configurations for multiple AI services, including metadata, options, and recommended prompts.
frontend/src/services/imageGeneration.ts: Implements image generation logic by routing requests to provider‑specific API handlers like OpenAI, Fal.ai, and Stability.
frontend/src/utils/artifacts.ts: Provides helpers for artifact URLs, downloading placeholders, MIME type detection, and filename generation.
Classifies backend errors into user‑friendly messages with detection for network, auth, timeout, and stopped‑canister issues.
frontend/src/utils/share.ts: Implements artifact sharing via Web Share API with clipboard fallback.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Handles extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using URL parsing and sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme extensions, colors, animations, and plugins for the frontend UI.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's state, including version info, known issues with ZIP generation, and metadata for existing features. Contains no executable code—only configuration and descriptive fields.
